CustomField.description: Reseller company email entered by the sales rep when creating or updating the Opportunity. The OpportunityTriggerHandler matches this against Reseller__c.Company_Email__c (case-insensitive) and auto-populates the Reseller lookup. Leave blank for direct deals (no channel partner).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the channel partner's company email if this deal came through a reseller. Match is case-insensitive. Leave blank for direct deals.
CustomField.label: Reseller Email
